title: Virtuoso 7, filter issue
description:
Hi,
I have already contacted the openlink team about this issue some time ago by mail, but I will post it here again to better follow it up.
The following query does not give a correct result for ?law.
Actually what happens, is we get:

1  the correct result for ?law
it is combined with about 30 other (invalid) results matching dcat:theme and other filters. These results reuse the ?law value of the first row (which is incorrect).

Instead, as each of these additional results have a different dct:identifier (or ?law) we need the correct correspondence.
In v6.1.6 it is ok. (running same query on same stored data.
PREFIX dc: <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
PREFIX void:  <http://rdfs.org/ns/void#>
PREFIX dct:   <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX dcat:  <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>
PREFIX wkd:   <http://schema.wolterskluwer.de/>
PREFIX foaf:  <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
PREFIX skos:  <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs:  <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX prov:  <http://www.w3.org/ns/prov>
SELECT DISTINCT ?law ?title ?issued
FROM <http://lod2.tenforce.com/wp9/work-dcat/catalog>
where {
   ?dataset a dcat:Dataset ; dct:title ?title .
   FILTER(lang(?title) = "de")
   ?dataset dct:identifier ?law ;  dct:issued ?issued .
   FILTER(regex(str(?law), "^http://publications.europa.eu/resource/cellar"))
   ?dataset dcat:theme <http://eurovoc.europa.eu/3969> .
   }
ORDER BY ?issued ?title
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE datasets (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT NOT NULL, identifier TEXT, issued DATE, theme TEXT);
INSERT INTO datasets (id, title, identifier, issued, theme) VALUES (1, 'Dataset 1', 'http://publications.europa.eu/resource/cellar/1', '2023-01-01', 'http://eurovoc.europa.eu/3969');
INSERT INTO datasets (id, title, identifier, issued, theme) VALUES (2, 'Dataset 2', 'http://publications.europa.eu/resource/cellar/2', '2023-01-02', 'http://eurovoc.europa.eu/3969');
SELECT DISTINCT identifier AS law, title, issued FROM datasets WHERE theme = 'http://eurovoc.europa.eu/3969' AND issued IS NOT NULL ORDER BY issued, title;
UPDATE datasets SET title = NULL WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Incorrect results due to invalid filtering of ?law values.
